headline: Is The Kraft Heinz Company (KHC) One of the Best NASDAQ Stocks to Buy for Dividends?
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 6.82%, The Kraft Heinz Company (NASDAQ:KHC) is included among the 12 Best NASDAQ Stocks to Buy for Dividends. The Kraft Heinz Company (NASDAQ:KHC) is the third-largest food and beverage company in North America and the fifth-largest food and beverage company in the world.
